name: deploys_create
description: Trigger a new deployment for a service. Optionally clear the build cache or specify a commit ID or image URL.

parameters.name: clearCache
parameters.description: Set to clear to clear the build cache. Default do_not_clear.

parameters.name: commitId
parameters.description: Git commit ID to deploy. Defaults to latest commit on configured branch.

parameters.name: imageUrl
parameters.description: Docker image URL for image-backed services.
